description_long: This office building features a tall, rectangular tower with a pyramidal roof, attached to a lower, boxy annex that extends horizontally. The facade is covered in a grid of small, evenly spaced windows, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance. The annex appears to have a flat roof and is connected to a smaller, protruding structure that could serve as a loading dock or service entrance. The main tower is the most prominent element, with its height and window pattern suggesting multiple floors. The building is rendered in muted gray tones with a tan roof, and the overall design is functional, with minimal decorative elements. There is no visible signage or ornamentation, emphasizing a straightforward, commercial architectural style.
description: A tall, modern office building with a pyramidal roof and a grid of small windows, attached to a lower annex and service area. The structure is utilitarian and rendered in gray with a tan roof.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main tower with its pyramidal roof, the attached annex, and a protruding service area.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the height of the main tower and the depth of the annex, with the service area less visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the tower and annex, with the service area and annex roof more prominent.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the length of the annex and the service area, with the tower seen from the side.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular grid of small, square windows evenly spaced across all visible facades.
